query:
ALTER TABLE establishments 
ADD COLUMN email VARCHAR(320) NULL,
ADD COLUMN cnpj VARCHAR(20) NULL,
ADD COLUMN responsibleName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN responsiblePhone VARCHAR(30) NULL,
ADD COLUMN twoFactorEnabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN twoFactorEmail VARCHAR(320) NULL;
